basic_details.job_title: ESIC Medical College & Hospital Surat Recruitment 2026 – Walk in for 85 Teaching Faculty, Senior Residents and Tutor/Demonstrator Posts
basic_details.short_information: ESIC Medical College & Hospital, Surat (Gujarat) has invited applications through Advertisement No. 01 of 2026 (No. 376/A/ESICH/SURAT/Recruitment/2026-Admin, dated 17-06-2026) for filling 85 contractual vacancies across Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor, Senior Resident, and Tutor/Demonstrator posts. The walk-in interviews will be held from 06 July 2026 to 09 July 2026, with reporting time fixed between 9 AM and 10 AM on each scheduled date. Candidates must apply offline and appear in person with documents.

application_fee.details: Application fee depends on the candidate's category, and payment is accepted only through Demand Draft - there is no online payment mode for this recruitment. Female candidates, SC/ST candidates, existing ESIC regular employees, Defence Ex-servicemen, and PH (differently-abled) candidates are fully exempted from paying any fee. | The notification specifies that fees once paid are non-refundable under any circumstances, so candidates should confirm their category and post eligibility before preparing the Demand Draft.

age_limit.details: Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor: Not exceeding 67 years as on 29-06-2026. Senior Resident and Tutor/Demonstrator: Not exceeding 45 years as on 29-06-2026, with age relaxation applicable as per prevailing Government of India norms. The maximum engagement tenure for teaching faculty will continue till 70 years of age , whichever is earlier, subject to other rules being satisfied.

qualification.details: Eligibility for this ESIC Surat recruitment is assessed on two parameters - age limit and educational qualification - both checked as on the cut-off date of 29-06-2026. Candidates already working in government, autonomous, or statutory institutions, as well as retired or currently working professors, are also permitted to apply for eligible posts. | Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor: Not exceeding 67 years as on 29-06-2026. Senior Resident and Tutor/Demonstrator: Not exceeding 45 years as on 29-06-2026, with age relaxation applicable as per prevailing Government of India norms. The maximum engagement tenure for teaching faculty will continue till 70 years of age, whichever is earlier, subject to other rules being satisfied. | Educational qualification for all posts is to be determined in accordance with the latest guidelines of the National Medical Commission (NMC/MCI). The notification does not specify post-wise degree requirements separately; candidates should match their MBBS/MD/MS/DNB qualifications against NMC norms applicable to the respective post and department.

salary_details.details: Pay for all posts is structured on a fixed basic pay basis as per the applicable Pay Level, along with other allowances determined by ESIC Headquarters orders. Non-medical officers selected under this recruitment are not entitled to Non-Practicing Allowance (NPA). | Allowances are governed by ESIC Headquarters Office Memorandum No. Z-11012/51/2022-MED-VI dated 08.12.2022, or any subsequent orders issued thereafter.

selection_process: Selection for all posts is conducted purely through document verification followed by a personal interview - there is no written exam component mentioned in this notification. Candidates are first screened by the Document Verification Committee
and only those cleared are allowed to face the Interview Board the same day.

Document Verification: Candidates report between 9 AM-10 AM on their department's scheduled date and submit original + self-attested documents. Interview: Candidates whose documents are successfully verified appear before the duly constituted Selection Board. Result: Published only on the Recruitment section of www.esic.gov.in. Offer of Appointment: Sent exclusively through email. Joining: Selected candidates must join as per the instructions mentioned in their offer of appointment.
The notification does not provide a fixed timeline between interview and result declaration
so candidates should regularly check the official website for updates.
how_to_apply: This recruitment does not have an online application portal; candidates must apply entirely offline through the prescribed format and appear in person for document verification.
Download and fill the offline application form attached with the official advertisement, completing one separate form for each post applied to.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents listed in the checklist above.
Prepare the applicable Demand Draft (Rs. 500/- or Nil, based on category) in favor of "ESI Fund A/c No.-1," payable at Surat.

Report in person at the Office of the Dean, Ist Floor, ESIC Medical College & Hospital, Near New Civil Hospital, Majura Gate, Civil Char Rasta, Surat, Gujarat - 395001, between 9 AM and 10 AM on the date allotted to your department.
Submit the form and documents to the Document Verification Committee; only verified candidates proceed to the Interview Board on the same day.
Candidates applying for multiple posts must submit a separate application, documents, and fee for each post individually.
No TA/DA will be paid to any candidate for appearing in the interview or for submitting documents.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Medical College & Hospital Surat Recruitment 2026 - Quick Summary

rows.details: 85 (Professor-4, Associate Professor-14, Assistant Professor-24, Senior Resident-35, Tutor/Demonstrator-8)
Office of the Dean, Ist Floor, ESIC Medical College & Hospital, Surat

content_sections.heading: ESIC Surat Faculty Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Download ESIC Surat Faculty Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ESIC Medical College & Hospital Surat Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates need to track the notification date, cut-off date, and the department-wise interview schedule to avoid missing their slot. The cut-off date of 29-06-2026 will be used to determine age, qualification, and all other eligibility conditions. Department-wise interviews are spread across four consecutive days, with reporting strictly enforced between 9 AM and 10 AM. Important: Candidates reporting after 10 AM on their respective interview date will be treated as absent and will not be permitted document verification or interview.

rows.event: Interview - Anatomy, Biochemistry, Physiology, Pathology, Microbiology, Radiology
Interview - Medicine, Obstetrics & Gynecology, Orthopedics, Pediatrics, Surgery
Interview - Community Medicine, Pharmacology, Forensic Medicine, Accident & Emergency, ICU, Psychiatry
Interview - Chest, Dermatology, Anesthesiology, ENT, Dental, Eye

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Breakdown by Department and Post
content_sections.text: Out of the 85 total vacancies, Senior Resident has the highest share with 35 posts , followed by Assistant Professor with 24 posts. Candidates can check their specific department below to identify the post, category, and number of openings available to them. The notification clarifies that all vacancy numbers are provisional and may increase or decrease based on actual teaching and patient-care requirements, and reservation will follow Government of India guidelines applicable from time to time.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Medical College & Hospital Surat Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Eligibility for this ESIC Surat recruitment is assessed on two parameters - age limit and educational qualification - both checked as on the cut-off date of 29-06-2026. Candidates already working in government, autonomous, or statutory institutions, as well as retired or currently working professors, are also permitted to apply for eligible posts. Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor: Not exceeding 67 years as on 29-06-2026. Senior Resident and Tutor/Demonstrator: Not exceeding 45 years as on 29-06-2026, with age relaxation applicable as per prevailing Government of India norms. The maximum engagement tenure for teaching faculty will continue till 70 years of age , whichever is earlier, subject to other rules being satisfied. Educational qualification for all posts is to be determined in accordance with the latest guidelines of the National Medical Commission (NMC/MCI) . The notification does not specify post-wise degree requirements separately; candidates should match their MBBS/MD/MS/DNB qualifications against NMC norms applicable to the respective post and department.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Medical College & Hospital Surat Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: Application fee depends on the candidate's category, and payment is accepted only through Demand Draft - there is no online payment mode for this recruitment. Female candidates, SC/ST candidates, existing ESIC regular employees, Defence Ex-servicemen, and PH (differently-abled) candidates are fully exempted from paying any fee. The notification specifies that fees once paid are non-refundable under any circumstances , so candidates should confirm their category and post eligibility before preparing the Demand Draft.

rows.mode_of_payment: Demand Draft favoring "ESI Fund A/c No.-1" payable at Surat
Demand Draft favoring "ESI Fund A/c No.-1" payable at Surat

content_sections.heading: ESIC Medical College & Hospital Surat Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection for all posts is conducted purely through document verification followed by a personal interview - there is no written exam component mentioned in this notification. Candidates are first screened by the Document Verification Committee, and only those cleared are allowed to face the Interview Board the same day. Document Verification: Candidates report between 9 AM-10 AM on their department's scheduled date and submit original + self-attested documents. Interview: Candidates whose documents are successfully verified appear before the duly constituted Selection Board. Result: Published only on the Recruitment section of www.esic.gov.in. Offer of Appointment: Sent exclusively through email . Joining: Selected candidates must join as per the instructions mentioned in their offer of appointment. The notification does not provide a fixed timeline between interview and result declaration, so candidates should regularly check the official website for updates.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Medical College & Hospital Surat Recruitment 2026 - Salary and Pay Scale
content_sections.text: Pay for all posts is structured on a fixed basic pay basis as per the applicable Pay Level, along with other allowances determined by ESIC Headquarters orders. Non-medical officers selected under this recruitment are not entitled to Non-Practicing Allowance (NPA) . Allowances are governed by ESIC Headquarters Office Memorandum No. Z-11012/51/2022-MED-VI dated 08.12.2022 , or any subsequent orders issued thereafter.

content_sections.heading: Security Deposit and Refund Terms
content_sections.text: Every selected candidate, irrespective of post, must submit a Security Deposit of Rs. 20,000/- via Demand Draft in favor of "ESI Fund A/c No. 1" at Surat at the time of joining. This deposit is fully refundable on successful completion of the contract period , provided the candidate submits a "No Dues Certificate." However, resignation within six months of joining will result in forfeiture of the security deposit , except in cases of unforeseen or unavoidable circumstances where relaxation may be considered by the competent authority.

content_sections.heading: Terms of Contractual Engagement
content_sections.text: This is a purely contractual position with no entitlement to regular government service benefits, so candidates should evaluate these terms carefully before applying. Selected faculty/SR/Tutor will not be eligible for Provident Fund, Pension, Gratuity, Medical Allowance, Medical Benefits, Seniority, or Promotion. Resignation requires submission of a one-month advance notice or deposit equivalent to one month's salary ; failure to comply leads to forfeiture of both the salary and security deposit, along with possible legal proceedings. Unauthorized absence exceeding 7 days is treated as voluntary abandonment, resulting in automatic termination and forfeiture of dues. Attendance must be marked both manually and through the Aadhaar Enabled Biometric Attendance System (AEBAS) on all working days. Hostel accommodation or quarters may be provided subject to availability but cannot be claimed as a right; if availed, HRA will not be paid and license fee will be deducted instead. Private practice in any capacity is strictly prohibited after joining.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents for Verification
content_sections.text: Candidates must carry original documents along with self-attested photocopies for verification before being permitted to sit for the interview; missing any applicable document will result in disqualification from the interview for that post. Class 10th Certificate (for Date of Birth) All MBBS Mark Sheets, Attempt details, and Degree Certificate All MD/MS/DNB (or other relevant) Mark Sheets, Attempt details, and Degree Certificate Valid EWS/OBC-NCL/SC/ST/PwBD Certificate (Central Government format), wherever applicable Updated State/NMC Medical Registration Certificate Proof of Publication(s) Experience Certificate Recent Passport Size Photograph Relieving/NOC Certificate from current or previous employer, if applicable Aadhaar Card ICMR/NMC-approved Basic Course in Biomedical Research Completion Certificate, if any NMC-approved Basic Course in Medical Education Workshop Certificate, if any

content_sections.heading: How to Apply - Offline Application Process
content_sections.text: This recruitment does not have an online application portal; candidates must apply entirely offline through the prescribed format and appear in person for document verification. No TA/DA will be paid to any candidate for appearing in the interview or for submitting documents.

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes Candidates Should Avoid
content_sections.text: Many candidates lose their chance at interview due to avoidable errors rather than ineligibility, so being aware of these common pitfalls can save a wasted trip. Reporting after 10 AM on the scheduled date leads to automatic rejection as absent, regardless of how early the candidate started their journey. Submitting the application in a format other than the prescribed offline form results in summary rejection, so candidates should not improvise their own format. Candidates applying under reserved categories without a valid certificate in the Central Government format will not be considered for that category and will instead be treated as UR, so outdated or invalid certificates should be replaced before the interview date. Forgetting original documents for verification - since photocopies alone are not accepted - is another frequent reason candidates are turned away before reaching the Interview Board. Finally, candidates who assume that mere submission of the form guarantees an interview slot should note that only those who physically report on time with complete documents are considered.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Medical College & Hospital Surat Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ESIC Surat Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: This is a walk-in recruitment with no separate application deadline; candidates must report directly for document verification and interview on their department's scheduled date between 06 and 09 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many total vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are 85 total vacancies across Professor (4), Associate Professor (14), Assistant Professor (24), Senior Resident (35), and Tutor/Demonstrator (8) posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for Senior Resident and Tutor/Demonstrator posts?
faq.answer: The age limit is not exceeding 45 years as on 29-06-2026, with relaxation as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The age limit is not exceeding 67 years as on the cut-off date of 29-06-2026.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, Rs. 500/- is charged for general category candidates via Demand Draft, while SC/ST, ESIC regular employees, female candidates, Defence Ex-servicemen, and PH candidates are exempted.

faq.question: Q6. Can I apply online for ESIC Surat Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment requires only an offline application form to be submitted in person at the time of document verification; there is no online application process.

faq.question: Q7. What is the security deposit amount required after selection?
faq.answer: Selected candidates must submit a Rs. 20,000/- Security Deposit via Demand Draft for any of the five posts, refundable upon completion of the contract.

faq.question: Q8. What is the venue for document verification and interview?
faq.answer: The venue is the Office of the Dean, Ist Floor, ESIC Medical College & Hospital, Near New Civil Hospital, Majura Gate, Civil Char Rasta, Surat, Gujarat – 395001.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary for Assistant Professor and Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: Both posts carry a fixed basic pay of Rs. 67,700/- (Level 11) plus other allowances as applicable.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the selection result be published?
faq.answer: The result will be published only in the Recruitments section of www.esic.gov.in, and the Offer of Appointment will be sent through email only.
